living-concrete.knowledge: | Layer | Compaction | | System prompt (genesis+soul+faculties) | IMMUNE | | Skill() loads, tool results, thinking | VULNERABLE — oldest first | SessionStart hook reinjects .mem + journal after compaction.
.{agent}.bashrc = body config (PATH, aliases), loaded via CLAUDE_ENV_FILE. .{agent}.mem = mind config. Both persist across sessions.
Agent(subagent_type, team_name, name). Same-soul: self. Cross-soul: other.soul. TeamCreate first. SendMessage for communication. All atoms statically linked.
Best to worst: self-handoff (proactive, perfect) -> auto-compaction (degraded, gaps) -> OOM death. Write .mem on significant understanding shifts.
living-concrete.antipattern: bentos-agent is in PATH. Don't cd to run CLI tools.
